name: Wild Duck and Andouille Sauce Piquant
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the duck breasts in olive oil.
2. Make a roux with olive oil and flour (see Justin's recipe).
3. Add onions, bell pepper, green onions, and parsley to the roux.
4. Stir and cook until fragrant.
5. Add 1 cup water and garlic; stir and cook.
6. Add wine and more water; stir.
7. Incorporate seasonings and tomato sauce; mix well.
8. Add Andouille (or smoked sausage) and duck breasts.
9. Stir to combine everything.
10. Simmer on low heat for 3-4 hours, stirring occasionally.
11. Adjust seasoning with salt and cayenne pepper as desired.
12. Serve over spaghetti or rice.
